title: GVH-122 No.1 Bunny Girl, The Most Shameful In History 3 - Mio Kimishima - Kimishima Mio
description: "Mio" lives in peace with her husband, the company owner. However, one day, my husband's company goes bankrupt due to fraud. The money borrowed from the anti-company cannot be returned, and strong men come to their homes to collect it. "Mio" gets raped in front of her husband because of debt. "Mio" who was abducted as it is will work as a bunny girl at a bar run by a strong man, but the results will not improve at all ... Insidious bullying, ridicule, and coercion from senior bunny girls. "Mio" who can't change her belly on her back is an obscene sex slave.
